meta-description: Learn about domestic partnerships by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Domestic partnership
excerpt: Two people of the same or opposite sex who live together and share a domestic life, but aren't married or joined by a civil union. In some states, domestic partners are guaranteed some legal rights, like hospital visitation.
content: Two people of the same or opposite sex who live together and share a domestic life, but aren't married or joined by a civil union. In some states, domestic partners are guaranteed some legal rights, like hospital visitation.
